rule: Plugins enhance structure, visuals, navigation, and accessibility. Plugins do not invent facts.

plugins.purpose: Search author-provided story nodes and scaffold tags.
Zoom visual evidence and memory cards.
Adds subtle glass-horizon light tracking without changing content.
Prepares future voice-log or spoken-word playback hooks. No audio is invented.
High-contrast pink-on-black mode for Steven's visual profile. Toggle via fixed button. Persists across sessions.
